tags.name: D/S General Suworow
tags.qa_note: Depth unconfirmed — JSON says 18m but only a YouTube video confirms this wreck exists. No independent depth source found. Geographic location in OSM (68.14N, 13.52E) places it in central Lofoten. Awaiting 2+ independent sources before re-validating.

Ballstad area confirmed as dive hub (ScubaBoard, X-Ray Mag). No independent source specifically confirms a site named 'Ballstad Reef'. Named wrecks (Gudrun Gisladottir, SS Ramø, Hamburg) and canyon dives are documented near Ballstad, but not a reef by this exact name. Insufficient sources for validated=true.

Shore diving near Kabelvåg is referenced regionally but no source specifically documents a site by this name. Difficulty upgraded from Intermediate (unchanged — was already Intermediate). Cold-water rule enforced.

Henningsvær is confirmed as a dive site with local operator coverage (Lofoten Opplevelser). Wall diving character consistent with Lofoten regional pattern. No source specifically names 'Henningsvær Wall' by that name. Insufficient sources for validated=true.

Difficulty upgraded from Beginner to Intermediate — Norway cold-water minimum rule. Svolvær referenced as a base for operator-guided dives (X-Ray Mag notes MV Siw-Aina wreck in Svolvær harbour). No source specifically documents a shore dive named 'Svolvær Harbor'. Insufficient sources for validated=true.

MV Hadsel wreck near Reine is confirmed (X-Ray Mag: coastal passenger liner, sank January 1958, rests 37-46m deep on sandy bottom near Reine). However, 'Reine Bay' as a named reef site is not confirmed separately. The main documented dive near Reine is the MV Hadsel wreck which sits 37-46m — that would be Advanced. 'Reine Bay' as a shallower reef site is unverified. Insufficient sources for validated=true.

Difficulty upgraded from Beginner to Intermediate — Norway cold-water minimum rule. Å is the southernmost Lofoten village; shore diving in the area is plausible but no source specifically documents this exact site. Insufficient sources for validated=true.

Moskstraumen (Maelstrom) confirmed as extreme current system (Wikipedia). Diving near Moskstraumen would be Advanced/Expert. However, no source specifically names 'Maelstrom Wall' as a dive site offered by any operator. Insufficient sources for validated=true.

Difficulty upgraded from Beginner to Intermediate — Norway cold-water minimum rule. Kelp forest diving is a confirmed Lofoten characteristic (X-Ray Mag, Scuba Diver Life). No source specifically documents a site named 'Stamsund Kelp Forest'. Insufficient sources for validated=true.
